items.name: Metal Fists
items.description: Punch with your vicious metal fist to do 15 damage. If double clicked, you swing the fists into each other.  Anyone unfortunate enough to get caught between them takes 50 damage! Click 'Q' to smash at the ground with the fists, creating boulders from the ground. Anyone hit by these boulders is dealt 40 damage. Click 'E' to knock your fists together, creating a shock wave. If hit, a player is knocked back and dealt a tiny amount of damage.
